preserveUserBrands: assets/brands/* except assets/brands/example/ (example is updatable, user brands are not)
notes: v0.8.7: Real one-click in-app updates — installer downloads and runs automatically. Dismissable update toast. Manual update check via clickable version label. Faster auto-update polling (30 min).
whatsNew: One-click in-app updates — no more browser hop
Click the version label to manually check for updates
Update toast is always dismissable, faster auto-check (30 min)
